name: @intentsolutionsio/liquidity-pool-analyzer
description: Analyze DeFi liquidity pools for impermanent loss, APY, and optimization opportunities

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install liquidity-pool-analyzer\\n  or /plugin install liquidity-pool-analyzer@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
